description: Modify the Chinook database schema (/home/ga/chinook.odb) to support artist photos by adding a binary column named 'ProfileImage' to the 'Artist' table. Create a form named 'ArtistPhotoManager' for the 'Artist' table including an Image Control bound to the 'ProfileImage' field. Download the image from 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/4d/Guitar_1.jpg/640px-Guitar_1.jpg' to '~/Downloads/guitar.jpg' and upload it for the artist 'Accept' (ArtistId: 2) using the new form. Save all changes to the database file.
